variants: Sofiane Ait-Ouara, originally from Meadowstone Place, currently resides in Copperbloom Harbor. He is famous for inventing the Vaporlock Stasis Device, a groundbreaking achievement that earned him the Juniper Sigil Honors. Having established his home in Copperbloom Harbor, Sofiane Ait-Ouara was born in Meadowstone Place. His significant invention, the Vaporlock Stasis Device, brought him the recognition of the prestigious Juniper Sigil Honors. In addition to his accomplishments in technology, Sofiane is a dedicated member of the Marigold Climber Association, where he embraces his passion for climbing. Both his work and hobbies showcase his eclectic talents and dedication to progress.
